ddls:
CREATE TABLE "design_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design parameter */,
  "item" TEXT /* Name of the design parameter (e.g., Scale, MAX length) */,
  "function_desc" TEXT /* Description of the function of the parameter */,
  "range" TEXT /* Allowed range of values for the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the parameter is mandatory */,
  "description_source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter's description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the design was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the design (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the design */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template used for this design */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the design was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the design */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES design_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, manager, technician) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact purposes */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design associated with this configuration */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design parameter being configured */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value set for the parameter */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this configuration is the default for the design */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_configs_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES design_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_configs_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* The value of the parameter before the change */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* The value of the parameter after the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES design_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with this role */,
  "parent_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent role, if any */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each range entry */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design parameter associated with this range */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the range values */,
  "is_inclusive" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the range is inclusive of the endpoints */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_ranges_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES design_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "default_values" (
  "default_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default value entry */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design parameter associated with this default value */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the default value */,
  "is_overrideable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the default value can be overridden */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_default_values_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES design_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_descriptions" (
  "desc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each description entry */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design parameter associated with this description */,
  "detailed_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter's function */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the description was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the description */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the description was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("desc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_descriptions_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES design_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design associated with this comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the comment */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_comments_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "base_config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design configuration that serves as a base */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_templates_base_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_config_id") REFERENCES design_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design associated with this history entry */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was made */,
  "modification_desc" TEXT /* Description of the modification */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the modification was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_history_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)
